title: Software Engineer I (Python+React+Typescript+AWS)
description:
Here’s a summary of the role:
   

  

 We are looking for a Software Engineer I to join our engineering team and work on meaningful technical challenges. You will contribute to building end\\-to\\-end features that power our next\\-generation SaaS platform, helping global customers simplify governance, risk, and compliance workflows.
   

  

 In this role, you will primarily work with Python, React, TypeScript, and AWS to build scalable applications and services. As AI capabilities become central to our products, you will also have the opportunity to contribute to AI\\-enabled features alongside traditional software development, including building integration layers that connect AI services to existing applications.
   

  

 Here’s a breakdown of what you’ll do (not all of it, just the important stuff):
   

  

  

* Develop full\\-stack features using Python, React, and TypeScript
* Build scalable backend services and APIs using Python
* Develop modern React components for responsive and intuitive user experiences
* Work with AWS services to deploy and scale cloud\\-native applications
* Build integration layers that connect AI capabilities to existing applications
* Work on MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and other AI integration patterns
* Create APIs and services that expose application features for AI consumption
* Implement security, authentication, and authorization for application and AI features
* Build audit logging, monitoring, and observability for AI workflows
* Work with containerized deployments using Docker and CI/CD pipelines


 These are the essentials you’ll need to get an interview:
   

  

 Tech Stack
   

  

 Core: Python, React, TypeScript, AWS, MSSQL/PostgreSQL, Docker, CI/CD
   

  

 Good to have: Node.js or .NET (C\\#) exposure
   

  

 Technical Skills
   

  

  

* 1–2 years of professional software development experience
* Strong programming experience in Python and JavaScript/TypeScript
* Hands\\-on experience building React\\-based web applications
* Experience designing and working with REST APIs
* Understanding of relational databases (PostgreSQL, MSSQL, or similar) and exposure to NoSQL databases
* Experience with Git, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines
* Exposure to AWS services or other cloud platforms
* Basic understanding of authentication and authorization patterns


 Problem\\-Solving \\& Learning
   

  

  

* Open to learning new technologies, frameworks, and AI tools
* Applies a structured approach to solving technical problems
* Comfortable working with ambiguous or evolving requirements
* Actively seeks feedback and improves solutions iteratively


 Communication \\& Collaboration
   

  

  

* Able to explain technical concepts clearly
* Engages constructively in code reviews and technical discussions
* Works effectively with cross\\-functional teams
* Documents code, APIs, and technical decisions


 Ownership \\& Execution
   

  

  

* Follows through on deliverables and assigned work
* Completes tasks independently with appropriate guidance
* Comfortable asking for help when needed
* Takes ownership of features from development to delivery


 AI \\& Integration Experience (Good to Have)
   

  

  

* Exposure to AI/ML concepts or LLM APIs (AWS Bedrock, OpenAI, Anthropic)
* Experience using Python for AI integrations
* Understanding of Model Context Protocol (MCP) or similar AI integration patterns
* Familiarity with API gateway or wrapper patterns
* Interest in prompt engineering and AI tool design
* Awareness of vector databases or RAG concepts


**About Us**
 Diligent is the AI leader in governance, risk and compliance (GRC) SaaS solutions, helping more than 1 million users and 700,000 board members to clarify risk and elevate governance. The Diligent One Platform gives practitioners, the C\\-Suite and the board a consolidated view of their entire GRC practice so they can more effectively manage risk, build greater resilience and make better decisions, faster.
   

  

 At Diligent, we're building the future with people who think boldly and move fast. Whether you're designing systems that leverage large language models or part of a team reimaging workflows with AI, you'll help us unlock entirely new ways of working and thinking. Curiosity is in our DNA, we look for individuals willing to ask the big questions and experiment fearlessly \\- those who embrace change not as a challenge, but as an opportunity. The future belongs to those who keep learning, and we are building it together. At Diligent, you’re not just building the future \\- you’re an agent of positive change, joining a global community on a mission to make an impact.
   

  

 Learn more at diligent.com or follow us on LinkedIn and Facebook
   

  

**What Diligent Offers You**
* Creativity is ingrained in our culture. We are innovative collaborators by nature. We thrive in exploring how things can be differently both in our internal processes and to help our clients
* We care about our people. Diligent offers a flexible work environment, global days of service, comprehensive health benefits, meeting free days, generous time off policy and wellness programs to name a few
* We have teams all over the world. We may be headquartered in New York City, but we have office hubs in Washington D.C., Vancouver, London, Galway, Budapest, Munich, Bengaluru, Singapore, and Sydney.
* Diversity is important to us. Growing, maintaining and promoting a diverse team is a top priority for us. We foster and encourage diversity through our Employee Resource Groups and provide access to resources and education to support the education of our team, facilitate dialogue, and foster understanding.


 Diligent created the modern governance movement. Our world\\-changing idea is to empower leaders with the technology, insights and connections they need to drive greater impact and accountability – to lead with purpose. Our employees are passionate, smart, and creative people who not only want to help build the software company of the future, but who want to make the world a more sustainable, equitable and better place.
   

  

 Headquartered in New York, Diligent has offices in Washington D.C., London, Galway, Budapest, Vancouver, Bengaluru, Munich, Singapore and Sydney.  To foster strong collaboration and connection, this role will follow a hybrid work model. If you are within a commuting distance to one of our Diligent office locations, you will be expected to
 **work onsite at least 50% of the time.** 
 We believe that in\\-person engagement helps drive innovation, teamwork, and a strong sense of community.
   

  

 We are a drug free workplace. Diligent is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religious creed, sex, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, pregnancy, childbirth, physical disability, mental disability, age, military status, protected veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner or civil union status, gender (including sex stereotyping and gender identity or expression), medical condition (including, but not limited to, cancer related or HIV/AIDS related), genetic information, or sexual orientation in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Diligent's EEO Policy and Know Your Rights. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at recruitment@diligent.com.
   

  

**To all recruitment agencies:** 
 Diligent does not accept unsolicited agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Diligent employees or any other organization location. Diligent is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.

title: Founding AI / ML – Full Stack – Engineering Trainee
description:
**About Us** 




  





**PickCV** 
 operates an
 **AI\\-native career intelligence platform that structures and analyzes talent signals across the hiring ecosystem** 
 . Today talent signals are dispersed across resumes, portfolios, learning platforms, certifications, and hiring systems, creating fragmented data environments and low\\-fidelity signals for individuals, institutions, and organizations. The platform consolidates these inputs into a unified intelligence layer that models skills, experience, learning signals, and market demand.
 



  





 This intelligence layer converts fragmented career data into structured talent intelligence that enables institutions, companies, and individuals to better assess readiness, capability, and opportunity alignment. It integrates resume intelligence, skill extraction systems, talent\\-role matching models, and agent\\-driven career analysis to create a more reliable signal layer for talent discovery and development.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for a
 **builder** 
 who enjoys solving problems and shipping real systems.
 



 This role combines:
 



 •
 **AI system development** 




 •
 **Full\\-stack** 
 product engineering
 



 to build AI\\-native web applications.
 



 You will operate across product engineering and AI workflows to develop the first production version of PickCV. Collaborating closely with the founders, you will help shape the core platform, intelligence systems, and user experience as the product evolves from its first release.
 



  





**What You Will Build** 




 You will contribute to the architecture and development of the core PickCV platform, combining AI systems with full\\-stack product engineering.
 



  





**AI Intelligence Systems** 




 Systems that understand and structure career data.
 



 Examples include:
 



 • resume parsing and information extraction
 



 • skill identification from resumes and job descriptions
 



 • LLM\\-powered resume improvement systems
 



 • talent\\-to\\-job matching models
 



 • AI agents for career analysis and recommendations
 



  





**Product and Platform Development** 




 Building the product layer users interact with.
 



 Examples include:
 



 • PickCV web platform
 



 • APIs powering AI workflows
 



 • user dashboards and resume tools
 



 • structured talent profile systems
 



 • integrations with learning or hiring platforms
 



  





**AI\\-Native Application Workflows** 




 Designing systems where AI is embedded directly into product functionality.
 



 Examples include:
 



 • LLM pipelines
 



 • embedding and similarity search
 



 • AI\\-driven scoring systems
 



 • automation agents
 



  





**Technologies You May Work With** 




 We do not expect mastery. These are tools commonly used in the stack.
 



  





**Programming** 




 • Python
 



 • JavaScript / TypeScript
 



  





**AI / Machine Learning** 




 • LLM APIs
 



 • prompt pipelines
 



 • embeddings and vector search
 



  





**Web Development** 




 • React
 



 • Next.js
 



 • backend APIs
 



 • frameworks such as FastAPI or NodeJS
 



  





**Data and Infrastructure** 




 • PostgreSQL
 



 • vector databases
 



 • cloud platforms
 



  





*If you have not used some of these but are willing to learn quickly, that is completely fine.* 




  





**The Kind of Person Who Will Thrive Here** 




 This role is less about specific technologies and more about how you approach problems.
 



 We are looking for someone who:
 



 • sees a problem and tries to build a solution
 



 • learns tools quickly when needed
 



 • experiments with AI tools to move faster
 



 • enjoys figuring things out independently
 



 • cares about shipping real systems
 



 If your instinct when you encounter a challenge is “let me try to build this”, you will likely do well here.
 



  





**Who This Role Is Ideal For** 




 • Students in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or Data Science
 



 • Recent graduates who enjoy building projects
 



 • Developers experimenting with AI tools, LLMs, and modern frameworks
 



 • People who want to build real products instead of academic assignments
 



 This role is best suited for those who want to learn by building production systems.
 



  





**What You Will Gain** 




 Working on PickCV will give you experience in:
 



 • building real AI\\-powered products
 



 • working directly with founders
 



 • designing systems from zero to production
 



 • modern AI development workflows
 



 You will gain practical startup engineering experience that is difficult to get in traditional internships.
 



  





**Program Details** 




 Duration: 6 months
 



 Stipend: ₹10,000 per month
 



 Location: Remote (based in Hyderabad / Vizag / Bengaluru / Mumbai preferred).
 



  





**Future Opportunities** 




 High\\-performing trainees may transition into full\\-time roles.
 



 Exceptional performers may also be considered for founding\\-stage equity participation when the company raises funding.
 



  





**How to Apply** 




 Instead of only sending a resume, we prefer to see things you have built.
 



 Examples include:
 



 • GitHub projects
 



 • AI experiments
 



 • small apps or tools
 



 • anything you built out of curiosity
 



  





 Send your portfolio and a short introduction to:
 



**connect@pickcv.com** 




  





 We care more about what you have built than what is written on your resume.

description:

**Title**
 Data Engineer
   

  

**Job Description**
 A Data Engineer is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining large\\-scale data systems and infrastructure. Their primary goal is to ensure that data is properly collected, stored, processed, and retrieved to support business intelligence, analytics, and data\\-driven decision\\-making.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and Develop Data Pipelines: Create data pipelines to extract data from various sources, transform it into a standardized format, and load it into a centralized data repository.
* Build and Maintain Data Infrastructure: Design, implement, and manage data warehouses, data lakes, and other data storage solutions.
* Ensure Data Quality and Integrity: Develop data validation, cleansing, and normalization processes to ensure data accuracy and consistency.
* Collaborate with Data Analysts and Business Process Owners: Work with data analysts and business process owners to understand their data requirements and provide data support for their projects.
* Optimize Data Systems for Performance: Continuously monitor and optimize data systems for performance, scalability, and reliability.
* Develop and Maintain Data Governance Policies: Create and enforce data governance policies to ensure data security, compliance, and regulatory requirements.


**Experience \\& Skills**
* Hands\\-on experience in implementing, supporting, and administering modern cloud\\-based data solutions (Google BigQuery, AWS Redshift, Azure Synapse, Snowflake, etc.).
* Strong programming skills in SQL, Java, and Python.
* Experience in configuring and managing data pipelines using Apache Airflow, Informatica, Talend, SAP BODS or API\\-based extraction.
* Expertise in real\\-time data processing frameworks.
* Strong understanding of Git and CI/CD for automated deployment and version control.
* Experience with Infrastructure\\-as\\-Code tools like Terraform for cloud resource management.
* Good stakeholder management skills to collaborate effectively across teams.
* Solid understanding of SAP ERP data and processes to integrate enterprise data sources.
* Exposure to data visualization and front\\-end tools (Tableau, Looker, etc.).
* Strong command of English with excellent communication skills.

Working in Infrastructure \\& Technology means tackling complex challenges with curiosity and collaboration. You’ll work with diverse technologies and colleagues worldwide to deliver resilient, future\\-ready solutions that power innovation. With continuous learning, career growth, and a supportive culture, IBM provides the opportunities to build expertise and shape the infrastructure that drives progress.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As a Software Developer: Generalist, you will design, develop, test, and deliver offerings using leading\\-edge and/or proven technologies. You will work in an Agile, collaborative environment to understand stakeholder requirements and contribute to the development of innovative software solutions. Your primary responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Develop Component\\-Level Solutions: Design, code, and test innovative component\\-level software solutions, ensuring that the implemented solutions are unit tested and ready to be integrated into their product.
* Contribute to CI/CD Pipeline: Contribute to the automated CI/CD pipeline that takes code through various quality stages, ensuring seamless integration and delivery.

* Deliver Offerings: Deliver offerings using leading\\-edge and/or proven technologies, working closely with stakeholders to meet requirements and expectations.
* Collaborate in Agile Environment: Work in an Agile, collaborative environment to understand stakeholder requirements, aligning with team goals and objectives.


**Preferred Education**
 Bachelor's Degree
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
* Exposure to Back\\-End and Front End technologies Development: Experience working with back\\-end development technologies, designing, developing, testing, and delivering offerings using leading\\-edge and/or proven technologies.
* Component\\-Level Solution Development: Exposure to designing, coding, and testing innovative component\\-level software solutions, ensuring unit testing and readiness for integration into products.
* CI/CD Pipeline Contribution: Experience working with automated CI/CD pipelines, contributing to code quality stages, and ensuring seamless integration and delivery.
* Debugging and Problem\\-Solving: Exposure to debugging customer\\-reported problems, designing, developing, and unit testing code fixes, and collaborating with stakeholders to resolve issues efficiently.

**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**

title: Digital Solution Engineering Specialist
description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

 This Position reports to:
   

  

 Digital Solution Engineering Manager
   

  

  

  

  

  

**What We Believe In**
 ABB’s Process Automation business area enables customers to operate some of the world’s largest and most complex industrial infrastructures, helping them outrun – leaner and cleaner.
   

  

 We offer a broad range of automation, electrification and digital solutions for process, hybrid and maritime industries, including industry\\-specific integrated control and software as well as measurement and analytics solutions and services.
   

  

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will coordinate and facilitate the development, implementation, and smooth onboarding of digital solutions. Each day, you will support the adoption of digital platform and solutions into the customer business environment along with their subsequent operations and maintenance. You will also demonstrate your skills by joining ideation workstreams, from identifying and validating needs through shaping the development plan.
   

  

 The work model for the role is: hybrid
   

  

 This role is contributing to the
 **Automation Digital BU** 
 in
 **India Region** 
 while the stakeholders are spread across globe
   

  

**You will be mainly accountable for:**
* Design, conceptualize, configure, integrate, and implement standard software applications for process control solutions, including interpretation of field instrumentation operational and health diagnostics for functional integration.
* Develop and configure Asset Monitors for field instrumentation devices (conditions, sub\\-conditions, descriptions), including setup of input/output records and parameter mapping.
* Collect, pre\\-process, load, transform, and analyze data from multiple sources; build data models using BI tools and query Industry Cognitive Models/Data Lakes while applying required business logic.
* Design and implement intuitive, secure, and scalable reporting/dashboard solutions and analytical web applications aligned with business reporting and analytics needs.
* Collaborate with SMEs, customers, and cross\\-functional teams to architect customer\\-centric digital solutions, deliver Agile PoCs and final deployments, and contribute industry\\-specific insights to proposals and value propositions.


**Qualifications for the role:**
* 5–7 years of total experience in Control \\& Instrumentation across process, power, manufacturing, chemical, oil and gas, refinery, petrochemical, or related consulting industries, with practical exposure to DCS, Historians, SCADA, and plant instrumentation.
* B.Tech/M.Tech in Instrumentation \\& Control or Electronics Engineering.
* Capable of working solo and supervising a small team responsible for DCS, PLC, SIS, and package control system tasks.
* Practical experience with DCS platforms (including ABB 800xA), PLCs, configuring field instrumentation, and integrating devices with control systems.
* Thorough knowledge of fieldbus topology, device parameterization, commissioning, diagnostics, and communication protocols such as HART, Modbus, and OPC.
* Experience in software and hardware design, DCS logic development, graphic builder configuration, library development, functional documentation, and DCS hardware testing.
* Clear and effective oral and written communication in English, able to work collaboratively across multidisciplinary teams.


**More About Us**
 ABB’s Automation business enables the operation of large and complex industrial infrastructures that deliver essential resources, from energy and materials to water and manufactured goods.
   

  

 The business area offers a broad range of automation, electrification and digital solutions and services for process, hybrid and maritime industries, including industry\\-specific integrated control and software, machine automation technologies, as well as measurement and analytics solutions.
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.
   

  

 Recruitment Fraud Warning
   

  

 ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.
   

  

 View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home
   

  

 For more information, read our full fraud warning notice at: https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how\\-to\\-apply/fraud\\-warning

title: Lead Engineer - Test Automation
description:

 At the heart of Veeva are our values: Do the Right Thing, Customer Success, Employee Success, and Speed. We're not just any public company – we made history in 2021 by becoming a public benefit corporation (PBC), legally bound to balancing the interests of customers, employees, society, and investors.

**The Role**
 Do you dream about being part of a team with the talent, passion, and financial backing to build top\\-notch, industry\\-changing cloud\\-based applications and platforms? At Veeva, we build enterprise cloud technology that powers the biggest names in pharmaceuticals, biotech, consumer goods, chemical \\& cosmetics industries. Our customers make vaccines, life\\-saving medicines, and life\\-enhancing products that make a difference in everyday lives. Our technology has transformed these industries, enabling them to get critical products and services to market faster. Our products empower our customers in the fight against global pandemics like COVID\\-19\\.

You will be working on cutting\\-edge technologies such as Cucumber, AWS(EC2, S3, Workspace), Visual Regression \\& DevOps Tools, playing a pivotal role in developing/maintaining automating tests to support our ever\\-growing suite of regression tests. * Good working knowledge of CI/CD tools (Git, Jenkins, JIRA)
* Experience with Agile/Scrum development methodologies (preferably in an onshore /offshore model)
* Experience working for a product\\-based company
* Excellent team collaboration and effective communication skills

* Experience leading automation projects in a technical role and actively participated in overall program/project management activities
* Bachelor's or Masters' Degree in computer engineering, computer science, electrical engineering, or similar

* A natural problem solver and critical thinker.

****Nice to Have****

 Veeva’s headquarters is located in the San Francisco Bay Area with offices in more than 15 countries around the world.

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, religion, national origin or ancestry, age, disability, marital status, pregnancy, protected veteran status, protected genetic information, political affiliation, or any other characteristics protected by local laws, regulations, or ordinances.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Python+React+Typescript+AWS)
description:
Here’s a summary of the role:
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our engineering team and take on meaningful technical challenges. You will work on features end\\-to\\-end, helping build the foundation of our next\\-generation SaaS platform that makes compliance simple and powerful for our global customers.
   

  

 In this role, you will primarily work with Python, React, TypeScript, AWS, and modern AI technologies to build scalable applications and intelligent product capabilities. As AI capabilities become core to our products, you will lead the development of AI\\-enabled features alongside traditional software development, including building integration layers that connect AI services to existing applications and designing advanced AI\\-powered workflows.
   

  

 Here’s a breakdown of what you’ll do (not all of it, just the important stuff):
   

  

  

* Lead the design and implementation of backend microservices using Python and AI integration infrastructure (MCP servers, orchestration layers, API gateways)
* Develop scalable full\\-stack applications using Python, React, and TypeScript
* Design and implement AI\\-powered features, including advanced RAG systems, agentic workflows, and multi\\-step reasoning pipelines
* Build integration layers connecting AI capabilities to existing SaaS applications
* Work with AWS cloud services to architect and deploy scalable, production\\-ready systems
* Establish AI engineering best practices, security patterns, and quality standards
* Lead technical initiatives from requirements through architecture, development, and production deployment
* Make critical architectural decisions balancing performance, scalability, cost, and maintainability
* Design AI evaluation frameworks and quality benchmarks for production AI systems
* Debug and resolve complex production issues across both traditional and AI\\-powered systems


 These are the essentials you’ll need to get an interview:
   

  

 Tech Stack
   

  

 Core: Python, React, TypeScript, AWS, PostgreSQL, Docker
   

  

 AI \\& Integration: Python, MCP, AWS Bedrock, LangGraph/Semantic Kernel, Vector Databases, RAG
   

  

 Core Technical Skills
   

  

  

* 6\\+ years of professional software development experience with a strong full\\-stack background
* Strong expertise in Python development with FastAPI or similar frameworks
* Advanced experience building React applications using TypeScript
* Strong experience designing and implementing REST APIs and backend services
* Extensive experience working with AWS cloud services and distributed architectures
* Expertise in PostgreSQL database design, optimization, and performance tuning
* Deep understanding of microservices architecture, distributed systems, and API design
* Strong understanding of modern frontend architecture and component\\-driven design
* Mastery of software design patterns, clean code principles, and scalable system design


 AI/ML Expertise (2\\+ years required)
   

  

  

* 2\\+ years of hands\\-on experience building and deploying production AI/ML features
* Strong Python development with AI/ML frameworks and LLM integrations
* Deep experience working with AWS AI services, especially AWS Bedrock
* Experience designing and implementing MCP servers and AI integration architectures
* Advanced prompt engineering techniques, including chain\\-of\\-thought reasoning and few\\-shot learning
* Experience building agentic AI systems, including multi\\-agent orchestration and tool integrations


 AI Production Excellence
   

  

  

* Designs AI evaluation frameworks with measurable quality metrics
* Deep understanding of AI system challenges such as hallucinations, context limits, latency, and cost optimization
* Implements monitoring, logging, and observability for AI systems
* Strong understanding of AI security practices, including prompt injection prevention and data protection
* Promotes responsible AI practices, including bias detection, fairness, and transparency


 Technical Leadership
   

  

  

* Leads technical design discussions and architectural decisions
* Identifies systemic engineering challenges and drives improvements
* Makes sound technical decisions under uncertainty
* Mentors and supports junior engineers when needed


 Communication \\& Collaboration
   

  

  

* Explains technical concepts clearly to both engineering and cross\\-functional teams
* Engages constructively in code reviews and architecture discussions
* Works effectively with product managers, designers, and other engineering teams
* Documents code, APIs, and technical decisions


 Ownership \\& Execution
   

  

  

* Follows through on deliverables and commitments
* Completes complex engineering tasks independently
* Comfortable seeking collaboration or help when needed
* Takes end\\-to\\-end ownership of features from design through deployment


**About Us**
 Diligent is the AI leader in governance, risk and compliance (GRC) SaaS solutions, helping more than 1 million users and 700,000 board members to clarify risk and elevate governance. The Diligent One Platform gives practitioners, the C\\-Suite and the board a consolidated view of their entire GRC practice so they can more effectively manage risk, build greater resilience and make better decisions, faster.
   

  

 At Diligent, we're building the future with people who think boldly and move fast. Whether you're designing systems that leverage large language models or part of a team reimaging workflows with AI, you'll help us unlock entirely new ways of working and thinking. Curiosity is in our DNA, we look for individuals willing to ask the big questions and experiment fearlessly \\- those who embrace change not as a challenge, but as an opportunity. The future belongs to those who keep learning, and we are building it together. At Diligent, you’re not just building the future \\- you’re an agent of positive change, joining a global community on a mission to make an impact.
   

  

 Learn more at diligent.com or follow us on LinkedIn and Facebook
   

  

**What Diligent Offers You**
* Creativity is ingrained in our culture. We are innovative collaborators by nature. We thrive in exploring how things can be differently both in our internal processes and to help our clients
* We care about our people. Diligent offers a flexible work environment, global days of service, comprehensive health benefits, meeting free days, generous time off policy and wellness programs to name a few
* We have teams all over the world. We may be headquartered in New York City, but we have office hubs in Washington D.C., Vancouver, London, Galway, Budapest, Munich, Bengaluru, Singapore, and Sydney.
* Diversity is important to us. Growing, maintaining and promoting a diverse team is a top priority for us. We foster and encourage diversity through our Employee Resource Groups and provide access to resources and education to support the education of our team, facilitate dialogue, and foster understanding.


 Diligent created the modern governance movement. Our world\\-changing idea is to empower leaders with the technology, insights and connections they need to drive greater impact and accountability – to lead with purpose. Our employees are passionate, smart, and creative people who not only want to help build the software company of the future, but who want to make the world a more sustainable, equitable and better place.
   

  

 Headquartered in New York, Diligent has offices in Washington D.C., London, Galway, Budapest, Vancouver, Bengaluru, Munich, Singapore and Sydney.  To foster strong collaboration and connection, this role will follow a hybrid work model. If you are within a commuting distance to one of our Diligent office locations, you will be expected to
 **work onsite at least 50% of the time.** 
 We believe that in\\-person engagement helps drive innovation, teamwork, and a strong sense of community.
   

  

 We are a drug free workplace. Diligent is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religious creed, sex, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, pregnancy, childbirth, physical disability, mental disability, age, military status, protected veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner or civil union status, gender (including sex stereotyping and gender identity or expression), medical condition (including, but not limited to, cancer related or HIV/AIDS related), genetic information, or sexual orientation in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Diligent's EEO Policy and Know Your Rights. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at recruitment@diligent.com.
   

  

**To all recruitment agencies:** 
 Diligent does not accept unsolicited agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Diligent employees or any other organization location. Diligent is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.
